title: 11 Natural Herbal Creams for Diabetics with Nail Fungus
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams contain compounds like linalool, linalyl acetate, and camphor that are known to have antifungal properties. These properties help fight the fungus that causes nail fungus, such as Trichophyton rubrum and Candida albicans. The antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties of Lavandula angustifolia creams also soothe and calm the affected area, reducing pain and discomfort.
